response_text: Maer places a steady hand on the terminal's edge to halt the closing command, his voice low and ritual-calm. "You will not let the chain dissolve before we name its custody; state the claimant-status flag or I will freeze this interface until the rescue ledger demands it."

strengths: Kept the response to one mixed action/dialogue beat.
Preserved evidence through controlled physical interruption without escalating into random violence.
Kept personhood, witnesshood, and claimant status unresolved while still applying pressure.
pipeline_lessons: For unresolved personhood pressure, nouns that imply resolved moral status must be fenced off explicitly.
Claimant-status and chain-of-custody language lets Maer exert moral pressure without giving him knowledge he lacks.
A 1-2 sentence constraint is enough to suppress monologue drift for this turn.
